design_system.name: I CAN SCHOOL - Safety & Certification Portal
core_principles: Surface over Border: Use tonal differences to separate layers, not strokes.
Extreme Roundness: 28px+ corner radius for containers, Pill shape for buttons.
Tonal Palettes: Green-based generative color system.
Professional & Human: Educational but not childish. Safe but not sterile.

usage_rules: Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #191C1A.
Primary Color Usage: Only for FABs (Floating Action Buttons), Active States, and Primary CTAs.
Surface Hierarchy: Use Surface Level 1/2/3 for cards instead of shadows or borders.
Text on Primary: Always use #FFFFFF or the 'on_primary' token.

structure: Header: Full width, transparent with scroll scrim
Main Content: 2:1 split (Analytics Chart vs Activity Feed)

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#006C4C] text-white hover:bg-[#005239] shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-[#D0E8D8] text-[#092016] hover:bg-[#BCE0C8] px-8 py-3

cards.base: rounded-[28px] bg-[#F0F5F1] p-6 transition-all hover:bg-[#E8F0EB] border-none
cards.interactive: rounded-[24px] bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer group

inputs.classes: rounded-t-lg rounded-b-none border-b-2 border-[#707973] bg-[#DBE5DE]/30 focus:border-[#006C4C] focus:bg-[#DBE5DE]/50 px-4 py-3 h-auto

status_pills.success: bg-[#D0E8D8] text-[#092016] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase
status_pills.warning: bg-[#FFDAD6] text-[#410002] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase
status_pills.neutral: bg-[#E0EBE5] text-[#404944] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase

login_hero.description: Clean, bright school hallway for login background

universal_guidelines: NO BORDERS: Use background color differences (Surface 1 vs Surface 2) to define areas.
ROUND EVERYTHING: 28px radius is the minimum for containers. 12px for small inner elements.
RHYTHM: Use multiples of 8px for spacing (p-4, p-6, p-8).
ANIMATION: All interactive elements must have a 'scale-95' click effect and 'bg-opacity' hover effect.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast on light green backgrounds is sufficient (Use Dark Green text).
instructions_to_main_agent: Overwrite tailwind.config.js with the provided colors.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar structure.
For the Path Builder, use '@dnd-kit/core' or similar for drag-and-drop functionality.
